tests.test_name: Uploading a test case file with no test cases shows an error toast
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page
tests.description: Uploading a BDD file that contains no test cases blocks the user with an error and leaves the input empty.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: An error notification appears when the uploaded file contains no test cases
No content is loaded into the input area when the file has no usable test cases

tests.test_name: Uploading a test case file in the wrong format shows a warning toast with suggestion -- bdd, robot_single_sample.robot, doesn't look like a BDD / Gherkin file, Robot Framework

parameters.mismatch_phrase: doesn't look like a BDD / Gherkin file

tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page
tests.description: When a user uploads a file that doesn't match the selected format, a warning is shown with a suggestion of the correct format, while still loading the file content.

test_coverage.verification_step: Warning toast appears with mismatch phrase
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User is notified that the uploaded file doesn't match the chosen format (BDD)
The warning recommends the correct format (Robot Framework) based on the file content
Despite the format mismatch, the file content is still loaded so the user can proceed

tests.test_name: Uploading a valid test case file shows no toast
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page
tests.description: Uploading a file that matches the selected format loads the content silently with no warnings or errors.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: A correctly matched file upload does not trigger any warning or error notifications
The valid file content is successfully loaded into the input area

tests.test_name: Pasting content that exceeds the character limit shows an error and does not load the box
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page
tests.description: Pasting content that is too long is blocked with a clear error message, preventing oversized input from being submitted.

test_coverage.verification_step: Paste error shown with 'too long' message
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Users receive a clear error when their pasted content exceeds the allowed character limit
Oversized content is rejected and not loaded into the input area

tests.test_name: Pasting valid matching content shows no toast
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page
tests.description: Pasting content that matches the selected format and is within size limits loads cleanly with no warnings or errors.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Valid pasted content does not trigger any warning or error notifications
The pasted content is successfully loaded into the input area

tests.test_name: Warning toast dismisses and content remains loaded
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page
tests.description: After dismissing a format mismatch warning, the uploaded content remains available so the user can continue working.

test_coverage.verification_step: Warning toast appears on mismatched upload
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A format mismatch triggers a warning notification
The user can manually close the warning notification

test_coverage.verification_step: Test case box is still populated
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Dismissing the warning does not clear the loaded content — the user's work is preserved

tests.test_name: Dropping multiple test case files in single-file mode shows a dismissible warning
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page
tests.description: Dropping multiple files when the page is in single-file mode shows a helpful warning guiding the user to switch modes, and the warning can be dismissed.

test_coverage.verification_step: Warning message is visible with multi-file guidance
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Users are clearly informed they need to switch to multi-file mode to upload more than one file at once

test_coverage.verification_step: Dismiss button is visible on the warning
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The warning provides a way for users to close it manually
No content is loaded when multiple files are dropped in single-file mode

test_coverage.verification_step: Warning message is no longer visible after dismissal
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Clicking the dismiss button successfully removes the warning from view
